name: Mold Inspection Sciences
description: Provides mold inspection and testing services in Orange County, focusing only on inspection and testing without remediation to avoid conflict of interest.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: If there were than 5 stars I could Joseph- I would!SO thorough, SO patient, SO nice, MUCH integrity
From the very first phone call, their customer service was impeccable-- friendly, responsive, and informative
He was one of the most professional workers that I've ever had. So unlike most kids his age.he was delightful
What really stood out was how willing and happy he was to answer all of our questions

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences has an exceptional reputation with universally positive reviews praising their professional, thorough inspectors, outstanding customer service, and expertise in mold assessment.
